LAW AND MOTION 301, LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SAMUEL STONE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING POSTED FOR THE FEBRUARY 10, 2026 HEARING WAS POSTED IN ERROR. COURT VACATES THE POSTED TENTATIVE RULING AND ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION CONTINUES THIS MATTER FOR HEARING ON FEBRUARY 17, 2026. COURT SIGNS AN ORDER CONTINUING TODAYS HEARING. ORDER IS SERVED ELECTRONICALLY ON ALL PARTIES BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAMUEL STONE'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.

The unopposed motion to set aside default and default judgment is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. The default and default judgment are set aside.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAMUEL STONE'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment

The Court's tentative ruling posted for the February 10, 2026 hearing was posted in error. Court vacates the posted tentative ruling and on the Court's own motion continues this matter for hearing on February 17, 2026.

Court signs an order continuing todays hearing. Order is served on all parties by the Courtroom clerk.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
